title: Paws & Pals
description: Paws & Pals: Befriend the creatures of your Minecraft world!
body: **Paws & Pals: Befriend the creatures of your Minecraft world!** Ever wished more vanilla mobs could become true companions? **Paws & Pals** expands Minecraft’s creatures with taming, pet behavior, and adventure-ready companionship. Starting with axolotls, this mod turns your favorite animals into loyal pals that can follow you, travel with you, and become a meaningful part of your world. --- ### What's New? * **Tameable Axolotls:** Wild axolotls can now become loyal companions! Befriend them by feeding them **Tropical Fish** or a **Bucket of Tropical Fish**. Once tamed, your axolotl will follow you and stay by your side as you explore. * **Shoulder Riding:** Bring your axolotl along for the journey! Tamed axolotls can ride on your shoulder, making them easier and safer to transport across your world. * **Pet Interaction:** Your axolotl is more than decoration. Feed your companion to heal them, keep them close, and enjoy a more personal pet experience. --- ### Why Paws & Pals? **Paws & Pals** is for players who want vanilla creatures to feel more alive, lovable, and connected to their adventures. Axolotls are only the beginning, with more tameable vanilla creatures planned for the future. Whether you are building a cozy home, exploring distant lands, or just want a cute friend on your shoulder, your pals are ready to come along.
